home.title: NY DMV Class D Prep
home.subtitle: Prepare for your New York Learner Permit Test
home.description: Study the official manual, practice by topic, and take realistic mock tests to ensure you pass.

test.earlyFailWarning: You are no longer able to pass this attempt, but you can finish the test to see your full review.

helpPage.howToUseText: Use the top navigation to study lessons, practice topics, or take mock exams.
helpPage.mockNormalDesc: 20 questions. Need 14/20 total and 2/4 road signs to pass.
helpPage.mockHardDesc: 20 questions. Need 19/20 total and 4/4 road signs to pass.
helpPage.mockExpertDesc: 50 questions. Need 49/50 total and 90% road signs to pass.
helpPage.accessibilityText: Use the buttons in the top right to change the language (EN/ES), toggle dark/light mode, or change the font size.
